programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and Cheryl hesitantly entrust Ryan and Jim to watch the kids and baby Tanner while they have a girls night out.

programme.title: Underwater
programme.desc: Disaster strikes more than six miles below the ocean surface when water crashes through the walls of a drilling station. Led by their captain, the survivors realize that their only hope is to walk across the sea floor to reach the main part of the facility. But the crew soon find themselves in a fight for their lives when they come under attack from mysterious and deadly creatures that no one has seen before.

programme.title: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: Transported to an alternate universe, four young outsiders gain superhuman powers as they alter their physical form in shocking ways. Reed Richards becomes Mr. Fantastic, able to stretch and twist his body at will, while pal Ben Grimm gains immense strength as the Thing. Johnny Storm becomes the Human Torch, able to control and project fire, while his sister Sue becomes the Invisible Woman. Together, the team must harness their new abilities to prevent Doctor Doom from destroying the Earth.

programme.title: Enemy of the State
programme.desc: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

programme.title: Iron Man
programme.desc: A billionaire industrialist and genius inventor, Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.), is conducting weapons tests overseas, but terrorists kidnap him to force him to build a devastating weapon. Instead, he builds an armored suit and upends his captors. Returning to America, Stark refines the suit and uses it to combat crime and terrorism.

programme.title: Iron Man 2
programme.desc: With the world now aware that he is Iron Man, billionaire inventor Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.) faces pressure from all sides to share his technology with the military. He is reluctant to divulge the secrets of his armored suit, fearing the information will fall into the wrong hands. With Pepper Potts (Gwyneth Paltrow) and "Rhodey" Rhodes (Don Cheadle) by his side, Tony must forge new alliances and confront a powerful new enemy.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service
programme.desc: Gary "Eggsy" Unwin (Taron Egerton), whose late father secretly worked for a spy organization, lives in a South London housing estate and seems headed for a life behind bars. However, dapper agent Harry Hart (Colin Firth) recognizes potential in the youth and recruits him to be a trainee in the secret service. Meanwhile, villainous Richmond Valentine (Samuel L. Jackson) launches a diabolical plan to solve the problem of climate change via a worldwide killing spree.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Richard Hooker, M*A*S*H follows a group of Mobile Army Surgical Hospital officers at they perform surgery and pass the time just miles from the front lines of the Korean Conflict. Led by Captains Hawkeye Pierce (Donald Sutherland) and Trapper John McIntyre (Elliott Gould), they add to the chaos and hilarity of the situation.

programme.title: The Detective
programme.desc: When a gay man is viciously slain, Detective Joe Leland (Frank Sinatra) is put on the case. Joe eventually tracks down the victim's roommate, who confesses to the crime and is sentenced to death; however, the outcome of the case doesn't sit well with the detective. Norma (Jacqueline Bisset), a distraught widow, visits Joe. She believes her husband's death was no accident, but the cops don't seem to care. Joe begins to investigate, and stumbles on a cover-up related to his previous case.

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt, a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meets Oktober, the mysterious leader of the group.

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov, the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police. Their plans are interrupted, however, when their Moscow hideout is raided by a cunning politician.

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist organization is holding an English ambassador hostage, which further complicates matters.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Two years ago, retired CIA agent Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) used his "particular set of skills" to rescue his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace), from kidnappers. Since then, Kim has been learning self-defense from her father, and Bryan has been on a personal mission to reunite with his ex-wife (Famke Janssen). In Istanbul, Bryan and his family cross paths with Murad (Rade Serbedzija), whose son died at Bryan's hand during Kim's rescue. Murad wants revenge, and he'll stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Ex-covert operative Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) and his ex-wife, Lenore (Famke Janssen), are enjoying a reconciliation when Lenore is brutally murdered. Bryan is framed for the crime and flees, with the CIA, FBI and police all in hot pursuit. For the last time, he channels his rage and particular set of skills into hunting down Lenore's real killers, taking his revenge and protecting the one important thing left in his life: his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace).

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: A depressed man suffering from insomnia meets a strange soap salesman named Tyler Durden and soon finds himself living in his squalid house after his perfect apartment is destroyed. The two bored men form an underground club with strict rules and fight other men who are fed up with their mundane lives. Their perfect partnership frays when Marla, a fellow support group crasher, attracts Tyler's attention.

programme.title: The Hustler
programme.desc: The story follows Fast Eddie Felsen (Paul Newman) and his adventures in the world of professional pool. Fast Eddie is a young hopeful on his way to challenging Minnesota Fats (Jackie Gleason) for his world title. When he starts getting feelings for a woman he gets into a dilemma.

programme.title: Surf Party
programme.desc: An Arizona gal (Patricia Morrow) and her friends enjoy sun, sand and romance when they drive out to California for a surfing vacation.

programme.title: Wild on the Beach
programme.desc: Music and romance abound as two groups of college students fight for their right to party at a beach house.

programme.title: The Day Mars Invaded Earth
programme.desc: A Cape Canaveral scientist finds Martians reducing people to ashes and taking their places.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Kaaapowie! Holy feature film, Batman ... one based on the tongue-in-cheek, campy 1960s television series. Watch Batman and Robin battle sharks, Catwoman, The Joker and The Riddler on the big screen. Can they try to prevent the bad guys from taking over the world? With a wham! and a pow! and a zip! ... our heroes just might win.

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage
programme.desc: The brilliant scientist Jan Benes develops a way to shrink humans, and other objects, for brief periods of time. Benes, who is working in communist Russia, is transported by the CIA to America, but is attacked en route. In order to save the scientist, who has developed a blood clot in his brain, a team of Americans in a nuclear submarine is shrunk and injected into Benes' body. They have a finite period of time to fix the clot and get out before the miniaturization wears off.

programme.title: Fathom
programme.desc: While touring abroad in Europe, beautiful American skydiver Fathom Harvill (Raquel Welch) gets wrapped up in international intrigue when Scottish spy Douglas Campbell (Ronald Fraser) recruits her to help him on a secret mission. Before long, Fathom realizes that no one around her, including the mysterious Peter Merriweather (Tony Franciosa), can easily be trusted, leading to various adventures that involve bull fighting, beaches and, of course, romance.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and budding actress whose futures will forever be altered by members of the Manson Family.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and budding actress whose futures will forever be altered by members of the Manson Family.

programme.title: Gleaming the Cube
programme.desc: A California skateboarder (Christian Slater) solves and avenges the death of his adopted Vietnamese brother.

programme.title: Squad Car
programme.desc: An accused man (Don Marlowe) helps a policeman (Paul Bryar) investigate an airplane mechanic's death and a counterfeit racket.

programme.title: Bigger Than Life
programme.desc: After schoolteacher Ed Avery (James Mason) faints and is hospitalized, doctors diagnose him with a fatal arterial illness and tell him he has a few months to live. Ed agrees to an experimental treatment with cortisone, and makes what appears to be a miraculous recovery. However, upon his return home, his wife, Lou (Barbara Rush), notices severe mood shifts in him. His friend and coworker Wally (Walter Matthau) also perceives the changes, and discovers that Ed has been abusing the cortisone.

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: Based on the Henry James story "The Turn of the Screw," a psychological thriller about a woman who takes a governess job for two orphans in a Victorian home. She begins to see what she believes are ghosts and suspects the children's bizarre behavior is the result of supernatural powers.

programme.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
programme.desc: Forty years ago, on the night they were meant to elope, Charlotte Hollis (Bette Davis) found her lover decapitated during a party, the blood on her dress leading everyone to suspect she was the murderer. Now, in 1964, Charlotte is an old recluse and must fight to keep her home. She enlists the help of her cousin Velma (Olivia de Havilland), who was there at the time of the murder. However, soon after Velma's arrival, Charlotte's mind becomes unstable, and she starts seeing her dead lover's head.

programme.title: Witchcraft
programme.desc: For generations, the Whitlocks and the Laniers have been feuding, including when Vanessa Whitlock (Yvette Rees), accused of being a witch, was buried alive centuries ago. Now Bill Lanier (Jack Hedley) wants to dig up a burial ground for development purposes, and Morgan Whitlock (Lon Chaney Jr.) tries to stop him. Soon, unexplainable accidents start to happen to members of the Lanier family, throwing suspicion on Morgan. The real truth Bill discovers is much more sinister than he expected.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: When a devious plot separates CIA agent Peter Sandza (Kirk Douglas) from his son, Robin (Andrew Stevens), the distraught father manages to see through the ruse. Taken because of his psychic abilities, Robin is being held by Ben Childress (John Cassavetes), who is studying people with supernatural powers in hopes of developing their talents as weapons. Soon Peter pairs up with Gillian (Amy Irving), a teen who has telekinesis, to find and rescue Robin.

programme.title: The Night House
programme.desc: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone at the lakeside home he built for her. She tries her best to keep it together -- but then the nightmares come. Disturbing visions of a presence in the house call to her, beckoning Beth with a ghostly allure. She soon begins searching for answers, only to find secrets both strange and disturbing.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: All seems well for Eric Bowen (Sam Rockwell), wife Amy (Rosemarie DeWitt) and their three children as they move into their new house in the suburbs of Illinois. Soon, the youngest daughter Maddy (Kennedi Clements) begins talking to an imaginary friend, or so the family thinks. It's not long before sinister spirits wreak havoc in the home, holding Maddy captive and forcing the parents to consult a team of parapsychologists who engage the supernatural entities in a battle for the girl's freedom.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding (1997)
programme.desc: Two friends (Julia Roberts and Dermot Mulroney) go from an impossible possibility to an unimaginable reality in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: After moving to a small town, Zach Cooper finds a silver lining when he meets next door neighbor Hannah, the daughter of bestselling Goosebumps series author R.L. Stine. Stine is very mysterious and a prisoner of his own imagination – the monsters that his books made famous are real, and he protects his readers by keeping them locked up in their manuscripts. When the monsters are accidentally unleashed and begin to terrorize the town, it's up to Stine, Zach and Hannah to get them back in their books where they belong.

programme.title: Here Today (2021)
programme.desc: Legendary comedy writer, Charlie Berns, in the initial stages of dementia, is befriended by Emma, a plucky, spirited, gutsy young singer and street performer who is not about to bail on Charlie, even as his condition deteriorates.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A widow's husband is reincarnated 25 years later as a dashing young man their daughter's age.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Meryl Streep is Julia Child and Amy Adams is Julie Powell in writer-director Nora Ephron's adaptation of two bestselling memoirs: Powell's Julie & Julia and My Life in France, by Julia Child with Alex Prud'homme. Based on two true stories, Julie & Julia intertwines the lives of two women who, though separated by time and space, are both at loose ends...until they discover that with the right combination of passion, fearlessness and butter, anything is possible.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: The Toy (1982)
programme.desc: Remake of the Pierre Richard comedy LE JOUET with Pryor as a penniless writer hired by zillionaire Gleason as plaything for spoiled son Schwartz. Gleason tells his son he can have any present he wants and the son picks the most outrageous gift of all--Richard Pryor.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product, a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: City Slickers II
programme.desc: Three urban adventurers return to the West and saddle up again, this time to search for hidden treasure.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Ashley Flynn, a warlock, tries to sweep Samantha off her feet but winds up helping Darrin get a new client.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin falls into the generation gap when he instantly becomes an old man after an unfriendly "zap" from Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha stirs up an impotent potion to get Darrin to stir up creative juices of his own.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Lisa uses wishcraft and learns a lesson in sisterhood.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora has her day and her way as-Darrin tries to sell bon bons.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Good Fairy gets into the brandy and makes-Samantha her substitute.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Good Fairy turns out to be bad news for Darrin and Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Return Of Darrin The Bold
programme.desc: Darrin is warlock for a day, courtesy of his interfering mother-in-law.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The House That Uncle Arthur Built
programme.desc: Uncle Arthur's romance turns out to be less practical than his jokes.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When Samantha's away, Serena tries to play and Darrin almost loses his hair over an advertising account.
Everyone's abuzz when the "birds and the bees" invade "227," but Brenda and Calvin may wind up getting stung when Mary discovers their secret rendezvous.

Mary's friends head for the highway after she implicates them in an angry letter to the President about a street pothole--but they make a quick U-turn when they discover the President himself is coming to fill in the hole. Film and television star Leslie Nielsen stars as investigating Secret Service agent, Bob Gamble.

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.
Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.
When Mary buys a piano, Rose peddles her teaching services to both her and Sandra--and the two pupils' rivalry inspires a competitive recital to determine who's learned more in three weeks.

When their church loses its lease, Mary coaxes an already overburdened Lester into supervising its move to a new location--but the parishioners are left without a place to worship on Christmas Day when the building mysteriously disappears
Mary and Sandra offer differing opinions when Rose is asked to spend the weekend in New York with the man of her dreams--who also happens to be one of Sandra's ex-nightmares.
When Calvin stays at the Jenkins' for the weekend, he misreads Sandra's attempts to cheer him up and falls madly in love with her, putting Mary in an awkward position.

When Lester's supposedly wealthy friend mysteriously accepts work as the building handyman, Mary sets out reveal his real motive and accidentally unveils more than one skeleton harbored in his "closet." Wrestling impresario Captain Lou Albano makes his television series debut as the gregarious handyman, Gus Santo.
Lester's dreams of cashing in his bonus from work for a new sports car come to a screeching halt when burglars break in and clean out the apartment--fueling Mary's desire to get new furniture.
Mary and Brenda cry foul when Sandra hooks up with a pro basketball player whose arrogant moves and behind-the-back "passes" rub off on impressionable Calvin.

Mary and Lester throw an extravagant bash for her parents' 50th wedding anniversary, only to find that the guests of honor aren't speaking to each other. Veteran performers Beah Richards and Whitman Mayo guest star as Mary's feuding parents.

Mary gambles her relationship with Rose and Pearl when she belittles their passion for the lottery, but the odds of losing their friendship increase when Sandra spies Mary playing a hunch and buying her own ticket.

Mary, Rose and Pearl may be sent "up the river" after they go overboard defending "227" against a graffiti artist who then sues them for assault--and it seems even bleaker when the key to their defense is the testimony of a lone eyewitness--Sandra.
Mary and Rose help Pearl face the loneliness of old age by escorting her to a single's bar where she meets the man of her dreams--and promptly gets engaged.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is so miserable when her favorite bra is discontinued, that Al is forced to take matters into his own hands and find a replacement.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Steve face up to the bald fact that they are both losing their hair, they decide to seek the counsel and encouragement of a hairless support group.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy hopes that an overnight stay in a motel will liven up her sex life with Al only to discover that their most intimate moments have been videotaped by the management.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When a gypsy fortune teller predicts disaster for Marcy and good fortune for Al, Steve and Peggy, Marcy insists that they accompany her on a plane trip to New York, first class, of course.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al's long-time barber passes on, Al is forced to face the fact that the old-fashioned barber shop is a thing of the past and resigns himself to a future of beauty salon haircuts.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundy's receive a modest inheritance check from Peg's deceased uncle, they decide to splurge and eat out at an elegant restaurant.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is the hit of Mother/Daughter Career Day at Kelly's school when she instructs the girls in the art of being a housewife, including demonstrations of wallet pilfering and mastering the TV remote control.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Kelly is faced with a choice of getting kicked out of school or joining the tap dance club, she swallows her pride, buckles on her tap shoes and performs some dirty dancing that leaves the audience sweating in their seats.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: A Three Job, No Income Family
programme.desc: When Peggy gets a job selling cosmetics and brings home more money than Al, he gets a second job to regain his self-respect, but still finds himself losing the breadwinning game.

programme.title: Married...With Children

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four friends made a pact to conceal a shocking secret. But now, someone has learned the truth.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All
programme.desc: When a mysterious stranger arrives at a local hospital on the brink of death, an FBI interrogation unlocks an international plot of revenge.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: There are heroes--there are superheroes--and then there's Hancock. With great power comes great responsibility--everyone knows that--everyone, that is, but Hancock. Edgy, conflicted, sarcastic, and misunderstood, Hancock's well-intentioned heroics might get the job done and save countless lives, but always seem to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake. The public has finally had enough--as grateful as they are to have their local hero, the good citizens of Los Angeles are wondering what they ever did to deserve this guy. Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.desc: Jimmy and Kim make a sideways move that takes a serious turn; Nacho gets closer to the cartel than he'd like.

programme.desc: Nacho runs for his life. Jimmy and Kim hatch a plan. Mike questions his allegiances.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Trying to put the memories of his deadly mission to Point Blanc behind him, Alex takes a holiday on the Cornish coast. But when an old foe resurfaces, Alex finds himself dragged back into the world of spycraft.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Determined to track down Alan Blunt and warn him, Alex unknowingly puts himself on a collision course with the Department who are simultaneously hunting a dangerous cyber-terrorist. But are the two cases more related than either side realise?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex refuses to walk away from his investigation into the attack on Ed Pleasance, and with Sabina and Tom's help discovers a new lead connecting it to the Pentagon hack, putting him in the crosshairs of Smoking Mirror.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex must infiltrate a prestigious event if he's to learn more about the mysterious phenomenon that is the video game Feathered Serpent and its coming sequel, confronting the charismatic billionaire behind it, Damian Cray.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To unlock the secrets of Feathered Serpent 2, Alex seeks expert assistance from an old friend. But with his own investigation spiraling out of control, how long before Blunt puts a stop to Alex's dangerous inference?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex, Tom and Kyra journey to Amsterdam, to infiltrate the heart of Damian Cray's operation, while the Department turn their scrutiny on Cray's forthcoming meeting with the President of the United States.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To escape Amsterdam and deliver vital evidence to the Department, Alex needs Jack's help - putting her career in jeopardy. But with the US President's touchdown in the UK already underway, is Alex too late to stop Cray?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Feathered Serpent 2 finally launches and the full scope of Cray's plan is revealed, Alex races against the clock to avert a catastrophic attack.

programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Superman: The Movie
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1

Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. programme.desc: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It

Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. Mia-Louise heads to a gaming expo where she unexpectedly comes face to face with her online partner James and the gap in age between them is finally revealed, and Connor finds himself at the centre of a school scandal when he is accused of sexually assaulting Lauren at Scousechella - meanwhile, Lauren struggles to reclaim her voice about what happened while everyone else showcases theirs, and especially in the case of The Brimble who escalates the drama and tensions with a podcast on consent. After Lauren finally confronts Connor and reveals truths about their relationship that clarify events at the party, the pair find closure and a friendship moving forward - elsewhere, Christopher struggles with jealousy over Aimee and Reece's kiss at the party and is offered support by Jodie, and Mia-Louise's relationship with James takes a turn when she makes an impulsive visit to his flat.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. It's the 100-year anniversary of Allsbrooke School - when Mr Meacher wants to celebrate it with an event highlighting its impact on past pupils' legacies and its ongoing influence on current students, this prompts Reece to confront some feelings he has been wrestling with as Mr Dunn's and Jodie's complicated history also comes to light. Meanwhile, Mia-Louise must make a decision on her relationship with James, there's a surprise twist as the person behind Ye Ma is finally revealed at the 100-year anniversary event when they release another video which helps Aimee realise a truth about her relationship with Christopher, and Mr Meacher inspires Reece to step up and deliver a surprise heartfelt speech that urges his fellow pupils to embrace the transformative and unique moments of their school years.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. The boys attempt to infiltrate a local firm of chariot hooligans in order to get some big drinkers into their bar - as Grumio is soon welcomed into the fold by Paulus, who is the head honcho of the Green Army, Marcus falls out with Gloria as her shop front keeps getting smashed up by their new clientele.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. France and Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home - Brian and Sarah therefore convert their rundown garage into a spot where France can work and where the family can relax while also carving out safe areas to kick a ball and entertain in style.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Dress To Impress

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. Life gets even more hectic for the Shepherds as school's out for summer for Nelly and Arthur, a home photoshoot leads to tension between Billie and Greg about Nelly wearing make-up, and a daddy and daughter date helps teach Nelly the value of money. Elsewhere, Greg and Chatty embark on a fitness journey with some shocking results, Billie glams up and goes head-to-head with some huge A-listers to win a prestigious award, and Arthur runs rings around Greg as he flies solo for the first time when he looks after all three kids.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's the party of the year: Diags has organised a glittery joint birthday bash for Pete and Chloe Sims, and everyone is invited. But it looks like not everyone will attend. Amber has declined the invitation, and in a show of loyalty, Dan is giving it a miss too.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Heather proposes a group trip to celebrate Monica's birthday that causes unresolved tensions between Monica and Lisa to reach a boiling point, and Angie leans on Whitney for advice about her marriage woes - meanwhile, Whitney and Justin join Meredith and Seth on their new podcast and open up about the status of their marriage before Heather throws a Pioneer Day-themed lunch to thank her friends for their support, but the day ends with hurt feelings and the upcoming trip hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Loose Lips and Relationships: Reality show. Jenn and Tamra put their issues to rest and plan a triple date, and Heather ventures into new territory with a venture. [S] S17 Ep9

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. The Housewives are left speechless and divided over Paige's dramatic exit on girls' night that left her bestie Ell firmly caught in the middle - pressure on Ell mounts when Paige unexpectedly gatecrashes an important dinner with Rachel and Seema, and big accusations are left on the wall at Nick and Royston's Demolition Disco.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Dion Dublin, Rachel Riley and Tim Vine all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: From 81 players down to the final nine - after weeks of fierce competition, it all comes down to this. In the grand finale of the game show hosted by Rob Brydon, the remaining contestants face one last series of high-stakes duels - two players will compete in a best-of-three final, but only one of them will conquer The Floor and take the 50,000-pound jackpot home.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Having navigated their way through lockdown, the Essex elite are back, and TOWIE royalty makes a welcome return to the fold. Amy Childs is back. Elsewhere, Chloe Sims and Pete were self-proclaimed platonic soulmates. But an argument back in January has left their friendship in tatters, and not even a pandemic has brought them back together.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: New: Love Island
programme.desc: As the second week continues for the class of 2026, the Islanders are already discovering that in this place, the path to true love never runs smoothly. [S] S13 Ep8

programme.title: New: Love Island: The Debrief
programme.desc: Your daily drop of hot Love Island tea, and all the Villa gossip. With Shakira Khan, Toni Laites and Yasmin Pettet, nothing is off-topic or out of the question. [S] S1 Ep6

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Reece wakes from a surreal nightmare to find Disneyland Darren standing in his bedroom after Jodie lets him stay in the spare room. His return sparks tension with Mr Dunn, now dating Jodie, and Darren’s chaos disrupts the household. At school, it’s Refugee Awareness Week led by the woke Brimble. After derailing events with pranks, Reece is forced by headmaster Meachy to help her, but another prank goes too far and publicly humiliates her, leaving him unexpectedly feeling guilty. Meanwhile, Darren’s jealousy of Dunn spirals into absurd mind games. At Jodie’s 40th birthday party, Darren and Dunn compete for attention with speeches and dance routines. The mood shifts when Jodie takes in two kids after their mum is sectioned, helping Reece realise real care can be helping those closer to home. He later shares this with The Brimble, beginning an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. After writing a story for a local magazine, Brian lands a job with the prestigious New Yorker. However, his college dropout status haunts him so he decides to go back to Brown University to get his degree. As Brian struggles to pass his class, Stewie enjoys the college lifestyle. Meanwhile, Peter and his friends combine forces to help the city.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. When the Griffins visit Lois's parents, Lois realises that her father prevented her from fulfilling her lifelong dream of becoming a model, so she returns to Quahog and hits the catwalk. Lois is an instant hit, but the glamorous world goes to her head and Peter has to step in to get her back on track. Meanwhile, Stewie starts a pyramid-scheme business and hires Brian as his assistant.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When the CIA organises a father-son baseball game, Stan is determined to show his co-workers that his son is masculine and athletic. Unfortunately, Steve is a geek, so Stan decides to lie and ditches him.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about CIA agent Stan Smith. Stan is outed as a virgin, in that he has never killed anyone, so Roger and the guys rally round to help him pop his cherry.

He later shares this with The Brimble, beginning an unlikely friendship.

Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Members of the Midsomer-in-the-Marsh Ornithological Society fall out when one of them, Ralph Ford, claims that he has spotted a blue-crested hoopoe - the sighting puts him ahead in a list competition, but MMOS president Patrick Morgan says that the bird could never have been seen in Midsomer as it is native to Uganda. Ralph storms out of the meeting infuriated - the next day Patrick is found dead in Swansdown Lake, the scene of the alleged hoopoe sighting, and his body is pulled from the lake entangled in a mist net used to catch and release birds. The dead man's wife Nina, a former Russian prima ballerina, had recently become pregnant - before his death Patrick Morgan accused Nina of sleeping with another man and professed it to be impossible that she was pregnant. Was Patrick's obsession with ornithology really to blame for his death, or something more sinister? Barnaby and Jones attempt to discover the truth.

programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin must investigate when the evacuation of a London hospital leads to the discovery of a tragic death. The Crown Prosecutors are working hard with the police to ensure that the case is tried, but they have reckoned without the silver-tongued Robert Ridley QC.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin find themselves with no leads while investigating the case of 13-year-old Danny Jackson, who is found, kicked to death at Euston Station. When they manage to locate the teenager's family, they discover a tangled web of family loyalties that covers Danny's ex-junkie mother, her allegedly abusive boyfriend, and Danny's foster mother. As the police officers uncover more about Danny's life, they become emotionally involved. But who was responsible for the boy's death? Meanwhile, Crown Prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips are up against defence barrister Beatrice McArdle, an old flame of James's. McArdle seems to be running a suspiciously simplistic strategy, until James and Alesha discover that she is gathering evidence for a defence so audacious that it could change the whole nature of the British legal system.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. The discovery of slaves on the Pritchard farm has turned a murder inquiry into a huge multi-agency investigation. Under investigation for the crash, a devastated Janet finds solace in Chris's calm reasoning. Meanwhile, an incandescent Evie Pritchard smells alcohol on DCI Gill Murray's breath and seems to have all the ammunition that she needs to discredit both the investigation and Gill. However, Scott and Bailey are determined to get Gill through to retirement with her reputation intact.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

Around the time that Grady arrives, his defence barrister Giles Harrison is killed. Grady had threatened Harrison and others - including Jones - but his alibi is strong. Later, Grady's house is firebombed, leaving him in a coma. Daniel's former friend Fred Burns is on trial for drugs offences. When Barnaby looks into Fred's background, he finds that a large sum of money appeared in Fred's bank account after the attack on Grady. After the court appearance, Jones learns that another lawyer on Grady's hit-list has been killed - but since Grady is in intensive care, he could not have been the culprit. As the detectives look further into the case, they discover that Grady always claimed innocence. Could a 'friend' be acting out Grady's revenge plan?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Anna's feelings for Matthew become more confused than ever as their physical relationship intensifies, while a worried Debbie tries to ensure Andy doesn't get access to Sarah.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiz agrees to give her relationship with John another chance, and a guilt-ridden Mel drowns her sorrows at the Rovers before heading back to the club where Abi was injured.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Determined to exact her revenge, Mel tracks down Abi's attackers. Fiz arrives back on the Street with John in tow, and Dev hides Nina in the bedroom when Prem turns up at the flat.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Mike finds himself compromised by a romantic liaison, and plans to celebrate Gina's birthday with a French-themed party.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Mike meets his match in feisty new solicitor Jackie Lambert, and Greengrass becomes a landlord.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the owners of Karras Games gather for a murder mystery weekend, the immersive experience takes a puzzling twist when a killer strikes for real and Barnaby and Winter's detective skills are put to the test as they are forced to solve this case on their own.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the bones of young Tommy Keegan are discovered in a basement, DS Ronnie Brooks, DS Matt Devlin and DI Natalie Chandler are faced with a 20-year-old cold case. The only people who seem to know anything about the case are the man originally arrested after the boy's disappearance, and Tommy's best friend Julia, who may have repressed memories. Crown Prosecutors Alesha Phillips and James Steel have a risky case on their hands.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When an arson attack on a Turkish club claims 17 lives, DS Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin are under pressure to discover just who was behind it. Their search is complicated by a trail of false identities, and the devious method of starting the fire. But when the arsonist is finally identified, James Steel and Alesha Phillips struggle to build a case. They begin to question whether the attack was really racially motivated. As George Castle puts pressure on for a result, James is suddenly placed in an awkward situation with an old friend.

programme.title: Wycliffe: Dance of the Scorpions

With the selection committee watching their every move, it's up to the bots to deliver show-stopping performances and prove that they belong amongst the best bots in the world - it's nonstop action and carnage, and i all builds to a kill-or-be-killed Main Event between superstars End Game and HyperShock.

programme.title: World Cup Countdown
programme.desc: The countdown to the FIFA World Cup 2026 is on and Daniyal Khan, Cams Babayemi, Kweku Afari, Roy Keane, Ian Wright and the gang are giving a full rundown of what to expect ahead of the biggest tournament ever this summer. In this episode, we discuss England's chances and Ian Wright offers us his starting England 11. David McCready starts to recreate the best World Cup goals of all time and we visit New York City.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: From
